title: pelargonium × veniferum
intro: Pelargonium × veniferum, also known as "Vervain of the Cape" or "Cape Vervain", is a plant species in the family Geraniaceae, which is a hybrid of Pelargonium tomentosum and Pelargonium capitatum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × veniferum include relief from fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to reduce stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
